body:
- Adds a unit-test element to the UniversalFunctions.jl module
- Tests that $\psi(\zeta) = \int_{0}^{\zeta} \frac{1-\phi(\zeta\prime)}{\zeta\prime} d\zeta\prime$ holds for all UF
- Adds QuadGK to dependencies
- Fixes Gryanik $\phi_h$
title: Add tests evaluating SCFs from similarity functions
